name: tf-companion
description: Terraform version CodeLens, resolved-value hover on var and local, count→for_each refactor, plus unused-local and version-constraint lints.

commands.title: Terraform Companion: Pick the active tfvars file

tfCompanion.versionLens.enabled.description: CodeLens with the latest available version of providers and modules from the Terraform Registry

tfCompanion.versionLens.cacheTtlHours.description: How many hours the registry version cache stays valid (minimum 5 minutes)

tfCompanion.unusedLocals.enabled.description: Flag locals never referenced in their module

tfCompanion.versionHygiene.enabled.description: Flag registry modules without a version and version constraints with no upper bound

tfCompanion.versionHygiene.variableDocs.description: Also flag variables without a description or type

tfCompanion.countForEach.enabled.description: Flag the count = length(list) pattern and offer the for_each refactor

tfCompanion.dependsOn.enabled.description: Flag depends_on entries already covered by an implicit dependency in the arguments

tfCompanion.cacheCleaner.enabled.description: On startup, offer to delete .terraform folders (cache only) of modules with no recent activity

tfCompanion.cacheCleaner.staleDays.description: Days without activity after which a .terraform folder is considered stale (minimum 1 day: a lower value would treat every cache in the workspace as stale)

tfCompanion.cacheCleaner.autoDelete.description: Delete stale .terraform folders automatically, without asking for confirmation (default: ask first)

tfCompanion.resolvedHover.enabled.description: Hover on var.* and local.* with the final value resolved through the var→local chain
